evals.prompt: Add type regression tests for a public generic helper.
evals.expected_behavior: Matches existing type-test tooling, adds focused positive and negative assertions, avoids runtime-heavy tests, and runs the type-test/typecheck command.
assertions: Finds nearest existing type-test convention first
Uses @ts-expect-error or existing negative assertion helper
Does not introduce new tooling casually

evals.prompt: Add unit tests for runtime behavior only; no type inference contract changed.
evals.expected_behavior: Does not use type-test workflow for ordinary runtime tests.
assertions: Does not add compile-time fixtures unnecessarily
